offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate inventory valuation reports instead of using manual spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual inventory tracking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Engage in community groups for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing inventory data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
